photo1.context: Celebrating the World Cup triumph alongside captain Rohit Sharma, holding the trophy and draped in the tricolor flag.
photo1.emotion: Deep joy, brotherhood, fulfillment, patriotic pride.
photo1.celebrationType: Broad smile posing with Rohit Sharma and the silverware.
photo1.jerseyVersion: 2024 T20 World Cup India Blue & Orange.
photo1.visualStrength: Historic, emotional visual weight. Captures the iconic retirement-stage victory of two giants of T20 cricket.
photo1.storytellingPotential: The perfect final chapter of Kohli's T20I career—lifting the world title alongside his brother-in-arms.

photo2.context: Roaring celebration in Melbourne after executing one of the most legendary run chases in cricket history.
photo2.emotion: Aggression, intense focus, roar of defiance, peak competitive fire.
photo2.celebrationType: Flexing bicep and roaring with determination, helmet on the grass.
photo2.visualStrength: Captures the raw intensity, focus, and physical standard that defined Kohli's chase dominance.
photo2.storytellingPotential: The sheer willpower that turned lost causes into inevitable victories under extreme pressure.

photo3.context: An intimate dressing room moment kissing the T20 World Cup trophy after the final victory.
photo3.emotion: Serene gratitude, relief, love, quiet satisfaction.
photo3.celebrationType: Kissing the tall silver trophy with closed eyes in quiet reflection.
photo3.jerseyVersion: 2024 T20 World Cup India Blue & Orange.
photo3.visualStrength: Intimate vertical portrait with soft, warm lighting.
photo3.storytellingPotential: The relief of a 10-year wait for an ICC world trophy, finally coming to a close.

photo4.context: Celebrating the match-winning runs at the Melbourne Cricket Ground (MCG) in front of 90,000 fans.
photo4.celebrationType: Arms spread wide up, looking to the sky with closed eyes, bat and helmet raised.
photo4.visualStrength: Highly dramatic vertical capture, full of emotional expression.
photo4.storytellingPotential: Rescuing India from 31/4 and climbing the ultimate pressure summit at Melbourne.

photo5.context: Broad smile holding the T20 World Cup trophy on the outfield, with the national flag behind him.
photo5.celebrationType: Smiling directly at the camera, holding the trophy with both hands.
photo5.jerseyVersion: 2024 T20 World Cup India Blue & Orange.
photo5.visualStrength: Vivid daylight action-portrait, high contrast and clarity.
photo5.storytellingPotential: Fulfilling a lifelong dream of winning a T20 World Cup as a veteran leader.
